Package io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.utils

Class Keys.Component

java.lang.Object
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.utils.Keys.Component
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.Keyed
Enclosing class:
Keys
public abstract static class Keys.Component extends Object implements org.bukkit.Keyed
Abstract class defining component keys used for food and consumable properties.

    static final org.bukkit.NamespacedKey
    CONSUMABLE
    Key representing consumable-related properties.
    static final org.bukkit.NamespacedKey

    Alias for a consumable component to support cross-version compatibility.
    static final org.bukkit.NamespacedKey
    FOOD
    Key representing food-related properties.
    static final org.bukkit.NamespacedKey
    USE_REMAINDER
    Key representing the item to remain after consumption.
